title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 354.210 - Director may seek relief, when
text:
354.210.  Director may seek relief, when. — If the director has reason to believe that any health services corporation is in such financial condition that the assumption of additional obligations would be hazardous to its members or the general public, the director may issue orders or seek relief to protect the public under the provisions of section 354.180.
(L. 1983 H.B. 127, A.L. 2007 S.B. 66)
